languages.text: "О подвигах? Пожалуй, вы и впрямь славно охраняли один из малых миров в моем протекторате". {n}В словах Себериана читается пренебрежение, от которого восхищение в глазах Дунавски сменяется растерянностью.{/n}

"Deeds? I suppose you did guard one of the minor worlds in my protectorate with some distinction." {n}Disdain colours Seberian's words, and the admiration in Dunawski's eyes shifts to bewilderment.{/n}
languages.original_text: "О подвигах? Пожалуй, вы и впрямь славно охраняли один из малых миров в моем протекторате". {n}В словах Себериана читается пренебрежение, от которого восхищение в глазах Дунавски сменяется растерянностью.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Deeds? I suppose you did indeed guard one of the minor worlds in my protectorate with some distinction." {n}Disdain colours Seberian's words, and the admiration in Dunawski's eyes shifts to bewilderment.{/n}

"Deeds? I suppose you did indeed guard one of the minor worlds in my protectorate with some distinction." {n}Disdain colours Seberian's words, and the admiration in Dunawski's eyes shifts to bewilderment.{/n}

"Deeds? I suppose you did guard one of the minor worlds in my protectorate with some distinction." {n}Disdain colours Seberian's words, and the admiration in Dunawski's eyes shifts to bewilderment.{/n}

"Deeds? I suppose you did guard one of the minor worlds in my protectorate with some distinction." {n}Disdain colours Seberian's words, and the admiration in Dunawski's eyes shifts to bewilderment.{/n}

languages.text: "Taten? Ich nehme an, Ihr habt eine der unbedeutenderen Welten meines Protektorats mit einer gewissen Entschlossenheit beschützt." {n}In Seberians Worten schwingt Geringschätzung mit und die Bewunderung in Dunawskis Augen weicht Verwirrung.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Deeds? I suppose you did guard one of the minor worlds in my protectorate with some distinction." {n}Disdain colours Seberian's words, and the admiration in Dunawski's eyes shifts to bewilderment.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Taten? Ich nehme an, Ihr habt eine der unbedeutenderen Welten meines Protektorats mit einer gewissen Entschlossenheit beschützt." {n}In Seberians Worten schwingt Geringschätzung mit und die Bewunderung in Dunawskis Augen weicht Verwirrung.{/n}

languages.text: « Des exploits ? J'imagine qu'on peut dire que vous avez protégé l'un des mondes mineurs de mon protectorat avec un certain honneur. » {n}Les paroles de Seberian sont teintées de mépris, et l'admiration dans le regard de Dunawski laisse place à la confusion.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Deeds? I suppose you did guard one of the minor worlds in my protectorate with some distinction." {n}Disdain colours Seberian's words, and the admiration in Dunawski's eyes shifts to bewilderment.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Des exploits ? J'imagine qu'on peut dire que vous avez protégé l'un des mondes mineurs de mon protectorat avec un certain honneur. » {n}Les paroles de Seberian sont teintées de mépris, et l'admiration dans le regard de Dunawski laisse place à la confusion.{/n}

languages.text: «¿Hazañas? Bueno, sí, supongo que se distinguieron protegiendo uno de los mundos menores del protectorado». {n}El desdén marca las palabras de Seberian, y la admiración en los ojos de Dunawski da paso a la confusión.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Deeds? I suppose you did guard one of the minor worlds in my protectorate with some distinction." {n}Disdain colours Seberian's words, and the admiration in Dunawski's eyes shifts to bewilderment.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «¿Hazañas? Bueno, sí, supongo que se distinguieron protegiendo uno de los mundos menores del protectorado». {n}El desdén marca las palabras de Seberian, y la admiración en los ojos de Dunawski da paso a la confusión.{/n}

languages.text: "Kahramanlıklar mı? Sanırım benim protektoramdaki önemsiz dünyalardan birini başarıyla korumuşsunuz." {n}Seberian'ın sözlerindeki küçümseme, Dunawski'nin gözlerindeki hayranlığın yerini şaşkınlığa bırakmasına neden oluyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Deeds? I suppose you did guard one of the minor worlds in my protectorate with some distinction." {n}Disdain colours Seberian's words, and the admiration in Dunawski's eyes shifts to bewilderment.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Kahramanlıklar mı? Sanırım benim protektoramdaki önemsiz dünyalardan birini başarıyla korumuşsunuz." {n}Seberian'ın sözlerindeki küçümseme, Dunawski'nin gözlerindeki hayranlığın yerini şaşkınlığa bırakmasına neden oluyor.{/n}

languages.text: “功绩？你们确实守护过我的属地里某个不起眼的星球，也算是有点小成绩吧。”{n}塞贝里安的言语中满是轻蔑，杜纳芙斯卡眼中的崇敬逐渐变成困惑。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Deeds? I suppose you did guard one of the minor worlds in my protectorate with some distinction." {n}Disdain colours Seberian's words, and the admiration in Dunawski's eyes shifts to bewilderment.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “功绩？你们确实守护过我的属地里某个不起眼的星球，也算是有点小成绩吧。”{n}塞贝里安的言语中满是轻蔑，杜纳芙斯卡眼中的崇敬逐渐变成困惑。{/n}

languages.text: 「証書だと？君が私の領土にある小さな世界を、ある程度は守っていたとは思う。」{n}シベリアンの言葉には軽蔑が混じり、ダナウスキの目は賞賛から困惑へと変わる。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Deeds? I suppose you did guard one of the minor worlds in my protectorate with some distinction." {n}Disdain colours Seberian's words, and the admiration in Dunawski's eyes shifts to bewilderment.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「証書だと？君が私の領土にある小さな世界を、ある程度は守っていたとは思う。」{n}シベリアンの言葉には軽蔑が混じり、ダナウスキの目は賞賛から困惑へと変わる。{/n}
